subject: <no subject>
body:
I am getting a lot of press and journalists calling
I would like to put out a statement
Can you call me – 212 8799366

These are not new allegations. The adding of language from an old resolved civil claim against Mr Epstein dating from 2008  is part of a cynical attempt to have Mr Epstein’s original case tossed and subsequently reopened by the US government.

My original response to the lies and defamatory claims remains the same.
Maxwell strongly denies allegations of an unsavoury nature,which have appeared in the British press and elsewhere.

THE TERRAMAR PROJECT<http://theterramarproject.org/>
